reviews.review_description: a fun and realistic farming game which teaches you how farming works. i like how you start with some basic machinery and paddocks to get you going and you upgrade and upscale as you make money from harvesting yout crops
Actually this game is very fantastic it is a very fun and attractive game also of high quality and excellent graphics.
Absolutely amazing gameplay, graphics, and controls. This game is a very Very good controls smooth game play hours of fun just.

Absolutely brilliant! You build up your own farm from scratch—planting crops, raising animals, crafting goods—and the vibrant graphics and smooth controls make it a joy. What I love most: The freedom to decorate and personalize your farm so it reflects your style.
The farming system is straightforward yet satisfying. You can plant seeds, water your crops, and trade. The hands-on nature of VR adds a fun layer of immersion.

The graphics are really very basic. 
I really wish the developers would finally start utilizing the potential of the Quest 3. 

But that's not the worst thing for me. There's no smooth turning, and I can't find the menu in the game to adjust things. The controls aren't bad, but driving backward is slower than walking. 
I wanted to love the game, but unfortunately, I had to return it. 
If ever gets an update, I might give it another try.

developer_response.body:
Hello! RocketCookie,
We just updated game, Smooth turn option is added now in settings. Tractor return speed is usually lower, though we have increased a bit. I hope you will find it better overall and edit review and rate.
Thanks.

reviews.review_description: I love this game!! It's so cool!! I'm really impressed with this game!! The game is also a really good game compared to what it already is.
“I’ve never played a game with such realistic tractor controls.” Players frequently praise how driving the tractor feels tangible and true to life, making the core experience satisfying.
A fun and realistic farming game which teaches you how farming works. I like how you start with some basic machinery and paddocks to get you going and you upgrade and upscale.

The farming Tractor is a really exciting game. extremely amazing it contains challenging tasks, nice features, a beautiful environment and unlimited entertainment, I recommended to all play this lovely game.
Good game nice feature tractor game is my favourite game 🎮
Cool graphics, easy to play, kinda addictive 😎
Very nice 🎮 👍
very good best game of all times if you like farm work its like the real thing there.

Be a farmer. 
Drive a tractor. Milk cows. Look for the goats.

Log in daily and you get a reward. 
Also a lot of quest to complete.

Farming Tractor is a cozy and satisfying simulator that lets you step into the boots of a VR farmer — without the usual complexity. Whether you're milking cows, managing a greenhouse, raising animals, or cruising around in your tractor, each task is short, focused, and fun. The game captures the charm of farm life with simple missions and a peaceful setting. It’s surprisingly engaging and well-executed, making it easy to jump in for a quick session or spend hours growing your virtual homestead. A great pick for anyone who wants a stress-free farming experience in VR.

reviews.review_title: Paying for gas with real life money.
reviews.review_description:
This is completely insane. Tractor guzzles the gas, and you have to pay real life money to keep going. Every level I go to think maybe I can get money from this one I already did. NO! The coin system is useless. You don't even use that money. This has to change. 

I'm stuck with this game because of trying to figure crap out and getting stuck.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for feedback. Yes, Before its was given enough fuel to complete task, not for roaming in field. once you complete task you get a coin that can be used to purchase new tractor and unlock it.
Also now Game is updated, there is no more restriction on gas now.

reviews.review_title: Great game for those who love tractors.
reviews.review_description:
I've never played a game with such realistic tractor controls. Definitely the coolest thing about the game.

There is definitely room for improvement though:
1) Translation
2) Limited to missions, instead of roaming/exploring play.
3) Occasionally confusing missions, either due to bugs or poor directions.
4) When off the tractor, you move very slowly.

There are microtransactions, but you can also earn the currency to buy things in-game without spending real money by just playing regularly (The game rewards you currency on daily log-ins and completing missions).
Usually you don't run out of gas for a mission unless you are lost or are a terrible driver. But unlike another review suggests, gas doesn't require real money. You can use the currency in-game to get more of it. The currency in-game CAN also be replenished with real money. Again, I don't think it's necessary - just a faster way to progress through the missions.

developer_response.body:
Thanks, RoseSix.
We have noted some improvements, will soon make change for better experience.

reviews.review_description: This game is incredibly fun, it truly makes you feel like a farmer who has to complete various daily tasks. These tasks are very diverse, so there's always something different to do, which keeps the experience fresh. The game is not overly simplistic, though, as it presents enough challenges that require a bit of skill to tackle. However, with some practice and the right approach, all tasks can be completed. It’s the ideal game to unwind and relax after a long and tiring day at work, offering a calming and rewarding experience.

developer_response.body: Thanks Andy, Of course We are working on it, In next month we will give update with much more features.

reviews.review_description: The app seems to be a scam- within 5 minutes we were locked in a state where we had to pay more cash for “gas” for the tractor.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We understand your concern about running out of gas during free movement. In our VR Tractor Farming Game, we've ensured that you have enough fuel to complete essential tasks. However, for extended free exploration, additional fuel may be required, and we've provided an option to purchase it for those who wish to continue exploring the game world. We appreciate your input and are constantly working to improve the experience for our players.

Thank you for playing, and we hope you continue to enjoy the game!

EDIT : 
For gas concern, We we would like to inform you that we have updated game. Now you will no restrictions in free roaming and lack of fuel.

reviews.review_title: It's pretty OKAY. Though could be better
reviews.review_description:
I tried this after trying another game supposedly "like" this. It was no where near as "advanced". Not that this game is advanced, it's not terrible. It could use a lot of polish but as it stands it's actually enjoyable. It mostly works, though I had a problem with Task 5 BUT luckily you can skip the levels. That way if you can't finish one you can at least go to the next. The graphics are pretty basic but you can figure out what's going on at least. I DO NOT like the micro-transactions portion but they aren't required. At least there's no loot boxes ... at least I don't think. They really should run a translation check on all the text though. It's pretty obvious as it has misspelled words and the grammar is pretty awful in places. 

If it's on sale, give it a play. They want a little too much for it when I bought it but I don't fully regret my purchase with a lot of the actually bad scam games out there that are just dropped and abandoned.

developer_response.body:
Booreguard, Thanks for detailed feedback. Of course we have noted some points you mentioned. We takes your critics positively and add it in future development. 
Thanks.

reviews.review_description: Graphic aren’t very clear. Glitches, needs updating

developer_response.body:
Hello! PSutton,
Thank you for your feedback! Actually we have in game graphics same in trailer and and Screenshots, Regarding Glitches We appreciate if you bringing this to our attention. Our team works hard to ensure a glitch-free experience, and we haven’t identified any glitches during testing. However, we’d love to investigate further and assist you. Could you please share more details or screenshots at  contact@lmstudio.games?
Of course in short time we have plan to update app with new features.

reviews.review_description: I've been looking for a game like this. Can't wait for the updates. Laughed my head off learning to drive the tractor. Really, really fun game!

developer_response.body:
Hello! Marigolds
Thanks for review. Of course we will come with update to have more fun. :)

reviews.review_description: I think this is great. I see some great potential for education. is there a possibility to store progres into different games or save games?

developer_response.body:
Thanks sjonkooy. :) Ofcourse we will make it even better in future.
Regarding game progress save its task based game. So once you clear the task it's being unlocked and remain unlocked to play again.

reviews.review_title: Fun game with something to fix
reviews.review_description:
The game is growing good, many jobs to do in the farm with many interactions.
The only aspect to fix urgently is the camera behavior when driving the tractor, looks like we don't have a neck to stabilize the bumping path, like if we have the head mounted on the tractor's seat. This makes the experience a pain for motion sickness. 🤢

developer_response.body:
Hello! magen1
Thanks for the review. We have work on camera stabilization and motion sickness. You may find batter now onward. Please play latest version.
Regards.

reviews.review_description: Has great potential. With everyday update it gets better

developer_response.body: Thanks. Of course, In next update we are launching new category "Drone Farming". We hope it will be the best part of game with lots of fun.

reviews.review_description: Amazing game should get

developer_response.body:
Thanks firegod0609.
We are working on this game and will have update with lots of new levels. 
Have more fun. :)

reviews.review_description:
If you want to do farming in VR this is the game for you. It has a few issues graphics are a bit flat, audio comes in and out, Settings dont save.
Apart from that you have some fun tasks to do around the farm like drivingthe tractor, milking cows feeding chickens.

Wish there was more of an option to decide what tasks you want to do rather then you cannot continue till one task is finished. Spent all the money on fuel for the tractor so not sure why it doesnt last. The characters feel flat and non responsive just walk straight through you and alot of the items inthe game just jump around and doesnt move like it should.

With some updates this could be a great simulator but for now its just a bit of  janky fun.
Ran out of fuel very quickly and couldn’t do tasks to earn more !!

developer_response.body:
Hello! Jezzv
Thank you for your feedback! We understand your concern about running out of fuel during free movement. In our VR Tractor Farming Game, we've ensured that you have enough fuel to complete essential tasks. However, for extended free exploration, additional fuel may be required, and we've provided an option to purchase it for those who wish to continue exploring the game world. We appreciate your input and are constantly working to improve the experience for our players.

Thank you for playing, and we hope you continue to enjoy the game!
EDIT : Game is updated, now you will not have ran out of fuels in free roaming. I hope you will improve the rating and review.
Thanks.

reviews.review_description:
Seems fun so far but I ran out of fuel during the tutorial and I don’t know how to finish the tutorial so I can move onto the different levels. I have no more money for fuel and don’t know how to get any. 
￼

developer_response.body:
Hello!  Thanks for playing the game.
Tutorial : you do step by step with following the instruction and click on next button. 

Fuel : Fuel is not used in tutorial driving scene. It's used only in real tasks where you earn game currency on completion.

Game Currency : Actually we have given some game currency to buy fuel in initial stage, in case you run of fuel. Of course, For more game currency you earns while each completion of levels task and get new advanced tractor drive experience.

Till if you have any confusion regarding fuel, tutorial or game currency you can directly mail us on info@frontlinktechnology.com

Regards.

reviews.review_description: I think this game has a lot of potential. I like all the different activities you can do and it could be something that can keep you occupied for hours. I am a longtime user of the oculus and there has not been a game that has made me motion sick until this game. I’m only taking 1 star off for that as it seems to be an ongoing issue and the game is still in development. I feel reluctant to start up the game again as I tried my best to give it a good go but ultimately I had to quit early because of the motion sickness. I hope that the development team is able to fix this as it could be a really fun game.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Ali Makila,
Thanks for writing review. Yes. Of course, we have almost optimized motion sickness and  updates the game. I hope it's better than before.
Thanks and Regards.
